title: Fexcraft Official Server
description: Generic lightly modded City/Building/Driving server with a 50km² pregenerated Lithosphere Map. Still WIP.
body:
## Another Generic Survival City building server!

Lightly modded, Land-Developer powered protection and FSMM economy!

Wilderness is protected, if you want to start a town inform an admin!    
You'll get the whole area claimed (a square kilometer is fine) for you if you decide on a spot.    
_Infrastructure is still in the process of being built._    

## FRESH NEW MAP
50km x 50km in size!    
South is Tropical and North is Frozen.
![Map Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vklqm4Bc/images/329038e12af2ade5cdacec08a5c5293b199a1862.png)
